zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Clingman於1805年2月20日出生在美國田納西州時，她的父親Edward Clingan Sr.54歲，母親Jennet Kincaid30歲。她於1821年6月16日與Jonathan Sullivan在美國田納西州雷亞結婚。她於1850年住在美國阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普。她去世於1880年在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇享年75歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇。

nameMeanings.name: Clingman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Klingman
meanings: Americanized form of German Klingmann: elaborated form of Klinge .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

historicEvents.title: The Hermitage is Built
historicEvents.description: The Hermitage located in Nashville, Tennessee was a plantation owned by President Andrew Jackson from 1804 until his death there in 1845. The Hermitage is now a museum.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Tennessee was known as the Volunteer State because during the Mexican War the government asked Tennessee for 3,000 volunteer soldiers and 30,000 joined.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Sultana Tragedy
historicEvents.description: In April of 1865, the steamboat the Sultana exploded. The Civil War had been over for awhile so this was considered the worst maritime disaster in US history. Compared to the Titanic where 1,512 people were killed, 1,8000 soldiers were killed on the Sultana. Confederate soldiers that weeks earlier had been fighting with Union soldiers were now fighting to save their lives.
historicEvents.urlTitle: NPR- The Shipwreck that Led Confederate Veterans to Risk All for Union Lives

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Clingman was born on 20 February 1805, in Tennessee, United States, her father, Edward Clingan Sr., was 54 and her mother, Jennet Kincaid, was 30. She married Jonathan Sullivan on 16 June 1821, in Rhea, Tennessee, United States. She lived in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, United States in 1850. She died in 1880, in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 75, and was buried in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Clingman est née le 20 février 1805, à Tennessee, États-Unis, son père, Edward Clingan Sr., avait 54 ans et sa mère, Jennet Kincaid, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Jonathan Sullivan le 16 juin 1821, à Rhea, Tennessee, États-Unis. Elle a vécu à Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1850. Elle est décédée en 1880, à De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Clingmanが1805年2月20日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州で生まれた時，父Edward Clingan Sr.は54歳，母Jennet Kincaidは30歳であった。1821年6月16日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ルヒーでJonathan Sullivanと結婚した。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州カーロルセダー トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼女は1880年にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Clingman(이)가 1805년 2월 20일 미국 테네시 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Clingan Sr.(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jennet Kincaid(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1821년 6월 16일 미국 테네시 주 리아에서 Jonathan Sullivan(와)과 결혼했다. 1850년도에 미국 아칸소 주 카로 세더르 타운시프에서 살았다. 그녀는 1880년 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 데 록헤에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 데 록헤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Clingman nasceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1805, em Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Edward Clingan Sr., tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Jennet Kincaid, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Jonathan Sullivan em 16 de junho de 1821, em Rhea, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América. Ela viveu em Cedar Township, Carroll, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ela faleceu em 1880, em De Roche, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em De Roche, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Clingman родилась 20 февраля 1805 г. в местности Теннесси, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Edward Clingan Sr. было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Jennet Kincaid, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jonathan Sullivan 16 июня 1821 г. в местности реа, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты. Она жила в местности кедар тоуншип, карролл, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Она умерла в 1880 г. в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Clingman nació el 20 de febrero de 1805, en Tennessee, Estados Unidos, su papá, Edward Clingan Sr., tenía 54 años y su mamá, Jennet Kincaid, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Jonathan Sullivan el 16 de junio de 1821, en Rhea, Tennessee, Estados Unidos. Vivió en Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió en 1880, en De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
